channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 5 tips for mastering virtual communication
item.description: Andrew Brodsky is a management professor at McCombs School of Business at the University of Texas at Austin. He is also CEO of Ping Group and has received numerous awards, including being chosen by Poets & Quants as one of the Best 40-Under-40 MBA Professors of 2023.
item.dc:creator: Next Big Idea Club, Fast Company

item.title: Race to 100TB HDD heats up as Seagate pulls rug under Western Digital, Toshiba feet by acquiring HAMR-specialist
item.description: Seagate is set to buy a specialist in HAMR HDD production, a move which will be bad news for rivals Western Digital and Toshiba.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia confirms 'rare issue' with some RTX 5090 and RTX 5070 Ti GPUs – here’s how to check if you’re affected and to get a replacement
item.description: The launch of Nvidia's new GPUs has gone badly enough already, but now there's a hardware-level glitch slowing down RTX 5090 and 5070 Ti GPUs.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Beterbiev vs Bivol 2: Fight stream, REPLAY, cheapest PPV deals, how to watch light-heavyweight title rematch
item.description: The Russians meet again in Saudi Arabia – here are the best streams, the cheapest prices and how to watch Artur Beterbiev vs Dmitry Bivol live online.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Brazil Supreme Court justice orders Rumble suspension nationwide for alleged non-compliance
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — A Brazilian Supreme Court justice on Friday ordered the suspension of video-sharing platform Rumble in the South American nation for allegedly refusing to comply with court orders.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Sweden is investigating a damaged cable in the Baltic Sea
item.description: STOCKHOLM (AP) — Swedish authorities said on Friday they were investigating a damaged cable that was discovered in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a string of recent incidents of ruptured undersea cables that have heightened fears of Russian sabotage and spying in the region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Apple drops encryption feature for UK users after government reportedly demanded backdoor access
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple said Friday it will stop offering an advanced data security option for British users after the government reportedly demanded that the company provide backdoor access for any data those users have stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mom of Starliner astronaut says daughter 'honored' to be on ISS
item.description: Williams was one of two people testing the Starliner capsule, which was not deemed safe for crewed return.
item.dc:creator: Steph Whiteside, The Hill

item.title: Fitbit Sleep Lab leaked – new feature could give you personalized bedtime recommendations
item.description: Fitbit could be getting a new Sleep Lab feature that can give you personalized sleep schedule recommendations.
item.dc:creator: stephen.warwick@futurenet.com (Stephen Warwick), TechRadar

item.title: Rivian records first gross profit as EV policy risks loom
item.description: The California-based company's fourth quarter result easily topped the $32 million expected by Wall Street.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Netflix to invest $1 billion in Mexico production over next 4 years
item.description: The chief executive of streaming giant Netflix on Thursday announced a $1 billion investment to produce some 20 films and TV series in Mexico annually over the next four years.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Chaos ahead: emerging technologies will test data privacy, says Britain’s ICO
item.description: Emerging technologies such as connected transport, quantum sensing, healthcare diagnostics, and synthetic AI-driven content are creating huge gaps in data protection and privacy that could quickly outpace the ability of regulators and enterprises to contain them.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The Upside of Shared Phone Plans: AT&T's New SplitPay Service
item.description: AT&T introduces SplitPay, a new way for people to individually bill each other on shared wireless plans, eliminating the frustration of calculating account charges per line.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft updates VS Code C# Dev Kit extension
item.description: Microsoft announced updates to its C# Dev Kit for Visual Studio Code extension, including enhancements to Razor/Blazor Hot Reload and for debugging and testing Blazor web pages.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple introduces the iPhone 16e, a fast and powerful mid-range smartphone
item.description: Apple’s new iPhone 16e combines three innovations in one $599 package: an A18 chip, Apple’s fast smartphone processor; Apple Intelligence, the company’s private-by-design take on artificial intelligence; and the C1, Apple’s first-ever 5G radio.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: VMware by Broadcom: Product, service and support news
item.description: News of Broadcom’s plans to acquire VMware triggered concerns among customers, partners, and industry watchers, many of whom recalled Broadcom’s track record with prior high-profile acquisitions, including network switching vendor Brocade in 2016 for almost $6 billion, software firm CA Technologies
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Oracle extends support for on-prem Oracle Database 19c
item.description: As the status of an on-premises version of Oracle Database 23ai remains in limbo, the company has tossed a bone to its on-prem Oracle Database 19c customers in the form of an extension of Premier Support to Dec. 31, 2029, and Extended Support to Dec. 31, 2032.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Smart home device maker exposes 2.7 billion records in huge data breach
item.description: Major IoT data breach: Mars Hydro database with 2.7 billion records exposed. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says the breach is a reminder of the risks that come with using IoT devices.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A top Chinese official tours Thai-Myanmar border to highlight crackdown on scam centers
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Efforts to shut down online scam centers in Myanmar appeared to gain momentum on Monday as a top Chinese security official visited both sides of the Thai-Myanmar border ahead of expected large-scale repatriations of workers in the illicit industry.
item.dc:creator: JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, ABC 4
